text_jp:
我々全員の時代に計画があって、どれか
一つでも成功すると歴史が変わるって…{END}
text_en: If even one plan succeeds, history will change.{END}

text_jp: 全ての時代に計画があるのか…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
待って下さい
もし過去の計画が成功しているなら{END}
text_en: If even one plan succeeds, history will change.{END}

text_jp: 僕の時代はすでに変わっているはず{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 君たちの時代に何か異変はないか？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: あのオーロラ…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: そうか！ここは孤立した変異空間なんだ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
多分間違いない。ここでは外界とは
違う時間が流れている…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
この空間は、奴らが力を貯えるための
いわば、繭というところか…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: だとしたら、奴らの計画って…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: むっ！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: ぐっ！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: うぉっ！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: うわっ！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …時はおとずれた…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: あっ！？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: ハッ！{END}
text_en: Hah!{END}

text_jp:
…我が計画を邪魔するのは
貴様らか…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: その「肉体」…非力すぎる…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: むぅっ！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: お前は！？{END}
text_en: Who are you!?{END}

text_jp:
…やはり…
…ここにいたか…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: えっ！？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp:
その「力」…その「命」
あとわずかと思え…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 何だと！？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp:
空間は完成した…
しもべたちが完全なる闇を築く{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 我が帝国…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …完成は近い…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …一体、今のは！？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: こっちにも現れました！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 私も見た。…本郷先輩、あれは{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
うむ、おそらく奴がこの変異空間を
作り、怪人を蘇らせた黒幕…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
でも、あんな
力を持つ相手をどうやって{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
何か手はあるはず、まずは目の前の敵
全時代の計画を潰すのが先決だ{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp:
そうだ…しかし、時空を越えている奴らに
対し俺たちは各時代にバラバラだ…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …誰一人、失敗は許されない…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …隔離された空間、時間軸…そうか！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
もしかすると俺たちも
この空間を利用できるかも知れない{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: えっ！？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: というと？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: いいか、皆、足元を見ていてくれ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: あっ！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: これは！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: なるほど{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
この空間でした事は、この時間軸の
中ですぐに影響するに違いない{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 俺たちは時代は違うが、同じ場所にいる{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: これを利用すれば{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 協力しあえる{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
皆さんの姿は見えないけど
すぐ近くに感じます{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 僕らは１人きりな訳じゃない{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
俺たちの力を合わせれば、
きっと奴らの計画を阻止できる！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …どうやら戦闘開始のようです{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: そのようだ…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: みんな…死ぬんじゃないぞ！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
蘇った怪人軍団
その背後にうごめく強大な敵{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
それぞれの時代で計画を企て人類の
歴史を塗り替えようともくろむ{END}
text_en: If even one plan succeeds, history will change.{END}

text_jp:
それを迎え撃つ仮面ライダー
１号、Ｖ３、ＢＬＡＣＫ、アギト{END}
text_en: Kamen Rider... you are here too!{END}

text_jp:
今、時空攻防戦の火蓋が
切って落とされた！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
